description: The security team requires that the 'Payment Service' configuration be moved from hardcoded files to secure storage. Create a Library Variable Group named 'PaymentService-Prod' containing the variables 'Gateway_Url' ('https://api.stripe.com/v1'), 'Region_Code' ('us-east-1'), and a secret variable 'Live_Secret_Key' ('sk_live_51Mz92q92929492929'). Update the 'azure-pipelines.yml' file in the 'main' branch of the 'TailwindTraders' repository to reference this variable group.
